events.name: placeholder - translate application - do we need one event, do we need multiple events
Notice of discontinuance
events.notes:
* Decision/assumption - parties will be maintained on the main case, not on the gen app
* Decision made to remove Notify Bailiff event - this will be a business process instead (work allocation task for caseworker)
* Decision made to remove Raise a query as queries wil be raised on the main claim. Analysis to be undertaken for caseless contact (3rd party scenarios)
* Decision: breathing space will be mastered on the main claim and cover all scenarios
* Decision: add event 'respond to application' so that responses can be tied to the general application and keep everything together
